texto: Leopold, like most men of power and prestige, was not so much interested in listening to what others had to say as he was in having an audience.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jeremy Robinson: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Leopold, like most men of power and prestige, was not so much interested in listening to what oth…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, power, leopold pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
